sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.1g. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole profile down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.1g. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole profile down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 5g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 5g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 3.4g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for dairy, useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 3.4g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for dairy, useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 20% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 20% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Skimmed Milk stands out for easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. but it also gets held back by not everyone tolerates dairy well and fat quality varies wildly across dairy. Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
